reviews.comment:
Buena Gente. Tiene una playa de estacionamiento que por unos pesos, quien viene en camper o motorhome puede pernoctar sin problemas. En pleno centro.

(Translated by Google)
Good people. It has a parking lot where, for a small fee, those arriving in campers or motorhomes can stay overnight without any problems. Right in the city center.

reviews.comment:
Quise ir al baño y estaba cerrado hasta que , en dos horas, viniera la persona que los limpiamos

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to go to the bathroom and it was closed until the person who cleans them came in two hours.

reviews.comment:
Exelente y seguro lugar. Podes pasar la noche si venis viajando en una playa en el predio,  en pleno centro y con buenos baños por solo $ 500

(Translated by Google)
Excellent and safe place. You can spend the night if you're traveling, on a beach on the property, right in the center and with good bathrooms for only $500.
